description_long: This is a two-story residential house with a hip roof covered in brown tiles and two prominent chimneys. The exterior features a combination of white plaster and brown brickwork, with the brick accenting the corners and window surrounds. The house includes a partially covered terrace or balcony on the upper floor, supported by white columns and a pergola structure. Large rectangular windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. The main entrance is accessed by a small set of steps and is sheltered by a modest overhang. The overall design blends modern and traditional elements, with clean lines and a functional layout.
description: A two-story house with a brown hip roof, white and brick exterior, large windows, and a partially covered upper terrace.
description_view_0: Front and side view showing the main entrance, brick and white facade, large windows, and the upper terrace with pergola.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back door, steps, and the open structure of the upper terrace with visible pergola beams.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the main door, brickwork, and a clear view of the window arrangement and terrace.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the hip roof, brick accent, and fewer windows, emphasizing the solid wall section.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a single door, small set of steps, modest overhang, and brick accent surround
